emails.subject: FW: ETS Staff Meeting
emails.body: FW: ETS Staff Meeting Lynn, should I cancel Tuesday's team leader mtg. or would you like for me to reschedule for later that day? Also I have marked the week of the 26th for a staff mtg. would you like for me to schedule such a meeting? Thanks, Ava

emails.subject: FW: ETS Staff Meeting
emails.body: Sorry Lynn, I noticed the following mtg. has been rescheduled for Wednesday Nov. 28th thanks, Ava

emails.subject: Re: FW: ETS Staff Meeting
emails.body: Re: FW: ETS Staff Meeting Ava, please be sure tuesday afternoon is blocked ffor me to spend with the teams. Not just 1 to 2. Thanks Lynn Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
